ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: Core login controls are present, but the artifact contains duplicate password elements, unstable locators, decorative noise, and is missing critical validation and navigation elements required for reusable login workflow automation.

issues.message: Two approved elements represent the same password control using different DOM layers (native input and ion-input wrapper), creating ambiguity for downstream automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the most stable and business-meaningful password field element using a stable locator such as id=password.

issues.message: Locator id=ion-input-0 appears framework-generated and brittle because indexed Ionic IDs commonly change between sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a stable attribute-based locator such as placeholder='User Name' or a dedicated form control identifier if available.

issues.message: Element name is overly technical and inconsistent with business-oriented naming conventions.
Element name is too generic and does not clearly indicate it is an input field.
XPath locator depends on visible text formatting and may be brittle if UI capitalization or wording changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable attribute locator such as //ion-button[@text='Login'] from the provided target page signal.

issues.message: Background container is decorative layout content and not meaningful for workflow automation or verification.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the element from the approved artifact.

issues.message: Forgot Password navigation control required by the workflow is missing from the artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a forgot_password_link element with a stable locator.

issues.message: No authentication error message element is present despite explicit workflow requirements for invalid login validation.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a login_error_message element representing invalid credential feedback or authentication failure banner.

issues.message: Required field validation elements for username and password are missing even though required-field scenarios are part of the acceptance criteria.
issues.suggested_fix: Add username_required_validation and password_required_validation elements or a reusable inline validation message element if the UI uses a shared pattern.

issues.message: No observable authenticated-state indicator is defined for validating successful login completion.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a post-login state indicator such as account_menu_button, profile_icon, or authenticated_home_banner when available.

issues.message: Password masking verification support is weak because the artifact does not explicitly preserve the password field type behavior.
issues.suggested_fix: Retain the password input element using a locator tied to type='password' or id=password to support masking validation.

approved_elements.name: username_input
approved_elements.description: Username input field for customer authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_input
approved_elements.description: Password input field with masked entry behavior.

approved_elements.name: login_button
approved_elements.description: Primary action button used to submit login credentials.
